description.para: Register sets of MIPI CSI2 Rx Core

briefdescription.para: Image Information Register for each Virtual Channel.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_CCR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register is used for the enabling/disabling and resetting the core of CSI2 Rx Controller

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offset of XCSI_PCR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register reports the number of lanes configured during core generation and number of lanes actively used.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_CSR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register captures the core's status.

briefdescription.para: Reset in Progress OR Core Disabled.
Shift bits for Short Packet FIFO Full.
Shift bits for Short Packet Not Empty.
Shift bits for Stream Line Buffer Full.
Bit Shift for Reset in Progress.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_GIER_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the global interrupt enable bit.

briefdescription.para: Shift bits for Global Interrupt Enable.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_ISR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the interrupt status.

briefdescription.para: Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 3.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 3.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 2.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 2.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 1.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 1.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 0.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 0.
Shift bits for Frame received interrupt.
Shift bits for VCx Frame Error interrupt.
Shift bits for skeecalchs Error interrupt.
Shift bits for YUV420 word count interrupt.
Shift bits for Word Count corruption.
Shift bits for Incorrect Lanes configured.
Shift bits for Short Packet FIFO Full.
Shift bits for Short Packet FIFO Not Empty.
Shift bits for Stream Line Buffer Full.
Shift bits for Start of Transmission Error.
Shift bits for Start of Transmission Sync Error.
Shift bits for 2 bit ECC error.
Shift bits for 1 bit ECC error.
Shift bits for Packet CRC error.
Shift bits for Unsupported Data ID error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 3 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 3 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 2 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 2 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 1 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 1 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 0 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 0 Frame Level Error.

description.para: The interrupts are grouped into DPHY Level Errors, Protocol Decoding Errors, Packet Level Errors, Normal Errors, Frame Received interrupt and Short Packet related.
These are used in XCsi_InterruptHandler() to determine the particular callback

memberdef.name: XCSI_INTR_PROT_MASK
memberdef.initializer: (XCSI_ISR_VC3FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC3FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC2FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC2FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC1FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC1FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC0FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC0FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VCXFE_MASK)

briefdescription.para: Protocol decoding error mask for VC0-3.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 15.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 15.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 14.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 14.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 13.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 13.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 12.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 12.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 11.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 11.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 10.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 10.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 9.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 9.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 8.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 8.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 7.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 7.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 6.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 6.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 5.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 5.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 4.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 4.

memberdef.name: XCSI_INTR_VCFE_MASK
memberdef.initializer: (XCSI_ISR_VC4FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC4FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC5FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC5FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC6FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC6FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC7FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC7FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC8FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC8FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC9FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC9FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC10FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC10FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC11FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC11FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC12FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC12FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC13FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC13FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC14FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC14FLVLERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC15FSYNCERR_MASK | \ XCSI_ISR_VC15FLVLERR_MASK)

briefdescription.para: Virtual channel frame error mask for VC4-15.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_IER_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the interrupt enable masks

briefdescription.para: Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 3.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 3.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 2.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 2.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 1.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 1.
Frame Sync Error on Virtual Channel 0.
Frame Level Error on Virtual Channel 0.
Shift bits for Frame received interrupt.
Shift bits for YUV 420 Word Count error.
Shift bits for Word count corruption.
Shift bits for Incorrect Lanes configured.
Shift bits for Short Packet FIFO Full.
Shift bits for Short Packet FIFO Not Empty.
Shift bits for Stream Line Buffer Full.
Shift bits for Start of Transmission Error.
Shift bits for Start of Transmission Sync Error.
Shift bits for 2 bit ECC error.
Shift bits for 1 bit ECC error.
Shift bits for Packet CRC error.
Shift bits for Unsupported Data ID error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 3 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 3 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 2 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 2 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 1 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 1 Frame Level Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 0 Frame Synchronisation Error.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel 0 Frame Level Error.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_SPKTR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the masks for getting the 16 bit data, virtual channel and data type

briefdescription.para: Shift bits for Short Packet Data.
Shift bits for Short Packet Virtual Channel Data.
Bit Shift for Short Packet Data Type.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_CLKINFR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the masks for getting current status of clock lane

briefdescription.para: Shift bits for Clock Lane Stop bit.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_L(0..3)INFR register

description.para: This register contains the masks for getting current status of data lanes.

briefdescription.para: Bit Shift for Data Lane Stop State.
Bit Shift for Data Lane SkewCalHs State.
Bit Shift for Start of Transmission Error.
Bit Shift for Start of Transmission Sync Error.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XCSI_VC(0..3)INF(1/2)R register

description.para: This register contains the masks to get line count, byte count from Info Reg 1 and to get current data type being processed from Info Reg 2 for each virtual channel.

briefdescription.para: Number of long packets written into line buffer.
Byte count of current packet in process.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel Line Count bits.
Shift bits for Virtual Channel Byte Count bits.
Bit Shift for Virtual Channel Data Type.
Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
Static inline function to read data from CSI register space.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of CSI

briefdescription.para: Static inline function to write data to CSI register space.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of CSI
is the value to be written to the register.
